subject: Re: Réf.: TR:
body:
Dear jeffrey

From our side we could postponed the trip, visit the 2 works from Plant Thursday the 15th and have our meeting Friday the 16th all of us,but need an answer from Plant .
Please tell me if it is convenient for you Friday the 16th, or Thurday late afternoon

Thanks

jean

subject: Re: Réf.: TR:
body:
can you delay your trip one week, trump related issues occupying my time. say 13 14 instead

--
